title: Genk, Limburg — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Genk, Limburg: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Genk is a city in Limburg with a population of 66,000. A multicultural city in Limburg with a fascinating mining heritage, beautiful surrounding nature, and one of Belgium’s most diverse populations.
